test_cases.description: POST /api/ratings with valid phraseId and rating
steps: Send POST request with phraseId=1 and rating=4
test_cases.notes: Covers both create and update scenarios

test_cases.description: POST /api/ratings with invalid rating (out of range)
steps: Send POST request with phraseId=1 and rating=6
Expect 400 Bad Request with validation error
Send POST request without Authorization header

test_cases.description: RatingComponent input validation for rating between 0 and 5
steps: Expect onRatingSubmit called with correct value
test_cases.notes: Client side validation matches server constraints

test_cases.description: RatingComponent input validation rejects invalid rating
test_cases.expected_result: Error message shown and submission blocked

steps: Send request with expired or invalid JWT

test_cases.description: Role authorization - user can only rate phrases if authenticated
steps: Attempt to submit rating without login
Send POST request with phraseId as string containing SQL injection attempt
test_cases.notes: Using express-validator and Mongoose ORM protects against injection

test_cases.description: No PII logged or exposed in error messages
steps: Trigger server error by sending invalid data
Check logs and response for PII exposure
test_cases.expected_result: No PII in logs or error responses

test_cases.description: API responds within 500ms under normal load

issues_found.description: Missing Playwright or equivalent UI tests for RatingComponent and PhraseDisplay components
issues_found.recommendation: Implement end-to-end UI tests covering rating input, submission, error display, and integration with API

issues_found.description: RatingComponent does not disable submit button when input is invalid
issues_found.recommendation: Disable submit button or prevent submission more explicitly when rating is invalid to improve UX

recommendations.recommendation: Implement UI tests (Playwright) for RatingComponent and PhraseDisplay to cover critical user interactions and error states.
Add rate limiting middleware on backend endpoints to prevent abuse and improve security.
Improve UX by disabling submit button in RatingComponent when rating input is invalid.
